e: 1. Core Concept: Social Security. \n2. Logic: Jo log majboor hain, sarkar unhe kaam (jaise MNREGA) aur pension ki suvidha degi. \n3. Extra Fact: 'Old Age Pension' schemes isi Article ke vision par chalti hain.

q: Fundamental Duties were added based on the recommendation of which committee? / किसकी सिफारिश पर मौलिक कर्तव्य जोड़े गए थे?
e: 1. Core Concept: 1976 ki historical recommendation. \n2. Logic: Committee ne 8 duties sujhayi thi, par 10 jodi gayi. \n3. Extra Fact: Shuruat mein inka zikr 'Part IVA' ke ek hi Article 51A mein kiya gaya.

q: Article 36 defines 'The State'. Is it the same as Article 12? / अनुच्छेद 36 'राज्य' को परिभाषित करता है। क्या यह अनुच्छेद 12 के समान है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Definition of State. \n2. Logic: Jo 'State' Fundamental Rights lagu karne ke liye zimmedar hai, wahi DPSP lagu karne ke liye bhi zimmedar hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme Parliament, Assemblies aur Local bodies sab shamil hain.

q: The duty to 'Uphold and protect the Sovereignty, Unity and Integrity of India' is: / 'भारत की संप्रभुता, एकता और अखंडता को बनाए रखना और उसकी रक्षा करना' कर्तव्य है:
e: 1. Core Concept: Desh ki ekta. \n2. Logic: Har nagrik ka farz hai ki wo aisa kaam na kare jisse desh toote. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye duty 'Integrity' shabd ke sath aur bhi mazboot ho gayi hai.

q: Which Article provides for 'Just and Humane conditions of work' and 'Maternity Relief'? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद 'काम की न्यायसंगत और मानवीय स्थिति' और 'प्रसूति सहायता' का प्रावधान करता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Labor and Women Welfare. \n2. Logic: Jahan log kaam karein wahan ki haalat achi ho, aur mahilaon ko maternity leave mile. \n3. Extra Fact: 'Maternity Benefit Act' isi Article ko pura karne ke liye banaya gaya hai.

q: Fundamental Duties are mentioned in which part of the Constitution? / मौलिक कर्तव्यों का उल्लेख संविधान के किस भाग में है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Added part. \n2. Logic: Inhe baad mein joda gaya isliye 'Part IV' ke sath 'A' lagaya gaya. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme keval ek Article hai—Article 51A.

q: Article 46 directs the State to promote the educational and economic interests of: / अनुच्छेद 46 राज्य को किसके शैक्षिक और आर्थिक हितों को बढ़ावा देने का निर्देश देता है?
o: SC, ST and other weaker sections (SC, ST और अन्य कमजोर वर्ग)
e: 1. Core Concept: Social Upliftment. \n2. Logic: Jo varg pichde hain, unhe upar lane ke liye sarkar ko special schemes (Scholarships etc.) chalani chahiye. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye 'Social Justice' ka mukhya dhaar hai.

q: Which Fundamental Duty is about 'Protecting the Natural Environment'? / कौन सा मौलिक कर्तव्य 'प्राकृतिक पर्यावरण की रक्षा' के बारे में है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Ecology protection. \n2. Logic: Jungle, jheel aur nadiyon ko bachana humari zimmedari hai. \n3. Extra Fact: DPSP mein Article 48A bhi yahi baat kehta hai (Sarkar ke liye).

q: Article 43 provides for 'Living Wage' for workers. What is a 'Living Wage'? / अनुच्छेद 43 श्रमिकों के लिए 'निर्वाह मजदूरी' का प्रावधान करता है। 'निर्वाह मजदूरी' क्या है?
o: Enough for food, clothing, health and education (भोजन, कपड़ा, स्वास्थ्य और शिक्षा के लिए पर्याप्त)
e: 1. Core Concept: Decent standard of living. \n2. Logic: Mazdoori itni ho ki ek insaan ijjat se apni aur parivar ki basic jaruratein puri kar sake. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye 'Minimum Wage' se thoda upar ka concept hai.

q: How many Fundamental Duties were added in 1976? / 1976 में कितने मौलिक कर्तव्य जोड़े गए थे?
e: 1. Core Concept: Original addition. \n2. Logic: 42nd Amendment ne 10 duties jodi thi. \n3. Extra Fact: 11th duty (Education) bahut baad mein 2002 mein jodi gayi.

q: Which Article says DPSP are 'Fundamental in the governance of the country'? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद कहता है कि DPSP 'देश के शासन में मौलिक' हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Importance of DPSP. \n2. Logic: Bhale hi Court inpar action na le sake, par sarkar kanoon banate waqt inka dhyan rakhne ke liye 'Duty-bound' hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye kanoon banate waqt sarkar ke liye 'Moral Compass' ka kaam karte hain.

q: The duty to 'Safeguard Public Property and Abjure Violence' is: / 'सार्वजनिक संपत्ति की रक्षा करना और हिंसा का त्याग करना' कर्तव्य है:
e: 1. Core Concept: Non-violence in public life. \n2. Logic: Loktantra mein hinsa ki koi jagah nahi hai, isliye ise duty banaya gaya. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye duty aaj ke 'Protest Culture' mein sabse zaroori hai.

q: Article 39(f) directs the State to protect children against: / अनुच्छेद 39(f) राज्य को बच्चों की किससे रक्षा करने का निर्देश देता है?
o: Exploitation and Moral abandonment (शोषण और नैतिक परित्याग)
e: 1. Core Concept: Child Welfare. \n2. Logic: Bacchon ko azadi aur samman ke sath vikas ke mauke milein. \n3. Extra Fact: Ise 42nd Amendment se update kiya gaya tha.

q: What is the 11th Fundamental Duty about? / 11वां मौलिक कर्तव्य किसके बारे में है?
o: Providing education to children aged 6-14 (6-14 वर्ष के बच्चों को शिक्षा प्रदान करना)
e: 1. Core Concept: Parental responsibility. \n2. Logic: Sarkar school banayegi, par parents ka farz hai ki wo bacchon ko school bhejein. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye 86th Amendment Act, 2002 se laya gaya.

q: Which DPSP is based on 'Gandhian' ideology? / कौन सा DPSP 'गांधीवादी' विचारधारा पर आधारित है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Rural self-reliance. \n2. Logic: Gandhi ji 'Cottage Industries' (chote udyog) ko badhava dena chahte the taaki gaon amir banein. \n3. Extra Fact: Article 40 (Panchayat) aur 47 (Liquor ban) bhi Gandhian hain.

q: The duty to 'Protect and improve the natural environment' includes: / 'प्राकृतिक पर्यावरण की रक्षा और सुधार' के कर्तव्य में शामिल हैं:
o: Forests, Lakes, Rivers and Wildlife (वन, झीलें, नदियाँ और वन्यजीव)
e: 1. Core Concept: Environmental awareness. \n2. Logic: Ye sabhi kudrati resources desh ki sampatti hain aur nagriko ko inka dhyan rakhna chahiye. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme 'Compassion for living creatures' (jaanwaro ke prati daya) bhi likha hai.

q: Article 39(a) ensures the right to an adequate means of 'Livelihood' for: / अनुच्छेद 39(a) किसके लिए 'आजीविका' के पर्याप्त साधनों का अधिकार सुनिश्चित करता है?
o: All Citizens equally (सभी नागरिकों को समान रूप से)
e: 1. Core Concept: Economic Justice. \n2. Logic: Har nagrik ko kamane aur apna pet bharne ka barabar adhikar milna chahiye. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye socialist principle ka base hai.

q: Which Article provides for 'Uniform Civil Code' as a target? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद 'समान नागरिक संहिता' को एक लक्ष्य के रूप में प्रदान करता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Legal Uniformity. \n2. Logic: Poore desh mein shaadi, talaq aur viraasat ke kanoon ek jaise hone chahiye. \n3. Extra Fact: Ise 'Liberal-Intellectual' principle mana jata hai.

q: The duty to 'Cherish and follow the noble ideals of the freedom struggle' is: / 'स्वतंत्रता संग्राम के महान आदर्शों को संजोना और उनका पालन करना' कर्तव्य है:
e: 1. Core Concept: Patriotism. \n2. Logic: Jin adarsho ke liye humare krantikari lade, unhe hamesha yaad rakhna chahiye. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye duty nagriko mein desh-bhakti ki bhavna jagaye rakhti hai.

q: Which Article deals with the 'Promotion of Cottage Industries'? / 'कुटीर उद्योगों के प्रचार' से कौन सा अनुच्छेद संबंधित है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Rural Economy. \n2. Logic: Gaon mein chote-chote udyog lagane se berojgari khatam hogi. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye ek mukhya Gandhian principle hai.

q: Fundamental Duties are 'Statutory' duties. What does this mean? / मौलिक कर्तव्य 'साविधिक' (Statutory) कर्तव्य हैं। इसका क्या अर्थ है?
o: Parliament can enforce them by making laws (संसद कानून बनाकर उन्हें लागू कर सकती है)
e: 1. Core Concept: Indirect Enforcement. \n2. Logic: Bhale hi Samvidhan saza na de, par Sansad 'Forest Act' ya 'Flag Code' banakar inka palan karwa sakti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Verma Committee ne isi point par zor diya tha.

q: Article 38(2) aims to minimize inequalities in: / अनुच्छेद 38(2) किसमें असमानताओं को कम करने का लक्ष्य रखता है?
o: Income, Status, Facilities and Opportunities (आय, स्थिति, सुविधाएं और अवसर)
e: 1. Core Concept: Social Equality. \n2. Logic: Sirf paisa nahi, balki status aur suvidhao mein bhi bhedbhav khatam hona chahiye. \n3. Extra Fact: Ise 44th Amendment Act (1978) se joda gaya tha.

q: Who participates in the 'Electoral College' for the election of the President? / राष्ट्रपति के चुनाव के लिए 'निर्वाचक मंडल' में कौन शामिल होता है?
o: Elected members of Parliament and State Assemblies (संसद और विधानसभाओं के निर्वाचित सदस्य)
e: 1. Core Concept: President ka election 'Indirect' hota hai. \n2. Logic: Sirf 'Elected' (Chune hue) log hi vote dete hain. Nominated members (jo President khud chunta hai) vote nahi de sakte taaki bhedbhav na ho. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme Delhi aur Puducherry ki assemblies ke elected members bhi shamil hain (70th Amendment).

q: Which Article allows the President to grant 'Pardon' (क्षमादान)? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद राष्ट्रपति को 'क्षमादान' देने की अनुमति देता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Judicial Power of President. \n2. Logic: Agar court ne kisi ko saza di hai, toh President use kam ya khatam kar sakte hain. \n3. Extra Fact: President 'Death Sentence' (fansi) ko poori tarah maaf kar sakte hain, jo power Governor ke paas nahi hai.

q: What is the 'Impeachment' (महाभियोग) of the President under Article 61? / अनुच्छेद 61 के तहत राष्ट्रपति का 'महाभियोग' क्या है?
o: Process to remove President (हटाने की प्रक्रिया)
e: 1. Core Concept: Removal on 'Violation of Constitution'. \n2. Logic: Agar President Samvidhan todte hain, toh Parliament unhe hata sakti hai. Ye process kisi bhi house (LS ya RS) mein shuru ho sakta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Aaj tak India mein kisi bhi President par impeachment nahi chala hai.

q: The 'Ordinance-making power' (अध्यादेश) of the President is under which Article? / राष्ट्रपति की 'अध्यादेश बनाने की शक्ति' किस अनुच्छेद के तहत है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Legislative power when Parliament is NOT in session. \n2. Logic: Agar koi emergency kanoon chahiye aur Sansad ki chutti chal rahi hai, toh President ordinance nikal sakte hain jo kanoon jaisa hi hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Iski validity 6 mahine aur 6 hafte (6 months & 6 weeks) tak hoti hai.

q: Who administers the 'Oath' (शपथ) to the President of India? / भारत के राष्ट्रपति को 'शपथ' कौन दिलाता है?
o: Chief Justice of India (भारत के मुख्य न्यायाधीश)
e: 1. Core Concept: Constitutional start of term. \n2. Logic: Desh ka sabse bada judge (CJI) desh ke sabse bade adhikari ko shapath dilata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Agar CJI na ho, toh Supreme Court ka sabse 'Senior-most' judge ye kaam karta hai.

q: Under Article 143, the President can seek advice from: / अनुच्छेद 143 के तहत, राष्ट्रपति किससे सलाह ले सकते हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Advisory Jurisdiction. \n2. Logic: Kisi kanooni uljhan mein President SC se rai maang sakte hain. \n3. Extra Fact: SC rai dene ke liye majboor nahi hai, aur President us rai ko manne ke liye majboor nahi hain.

q: What is 'Pocket Veto' of the President? / राष्ट्रपति का 'पॉकेट वीटो' क्या है?
o: Keeping the bill pending indefinitely (विधेयक को अनिश्चित काल के लिए लंबित रखना)
e: 1. Core Concept: Power of Silence. \n2. Logic: Samvidhan mein koi time-limit nahi hai ki President kab bill sign karega. Wo ise bas apni 'pocket' mein rakh sakte hain. \n3. Extra Fact: 1986 mein Giani Zail Singh ne Indian Post Office Bill par ise use kiya tha.

q: The President can declare 'National Emergency' under Article 352 on which grounds? / राष्ट्रपति अनुच्छेद 352 के तहत 'राष्ट्रीय आपातकाल' किन आधारों पर घोषित कर सकते हैं?
o: War, External Aggression or Armed Rebellion (युद्ध, बाहरी आक्रमण या सशस्त्र विद्रोह)
e: 1. Core Concept: Desh ki suraksha. \n2. Logic: Pehle 'Internal Disturbance' tha, par 44th Amendment ne ise badal kar 'Armed Rebellion' kar diya taaki iska galat use na ho. \n3. Extra Fact: Emergency lagane ke liye 'Cabinet' ki written advice zaroori hai.

q: In the election of the President, what is 'Value of Vote' of an MLA? / राष्ट्रपति के चुनाव में, एक विधायक के 'वोट का मूल्य' क्या होता है?
o: Based on State Population / Number of MLAs (राज्य की जनसंख्या के आधार पर)
e: 1. Core Concept: Proportional Representation. \n2. Logic: Har state ki population alag hai, isliye UP ke MLA ke vote ki value Bihar ya Sikkim se alag hogi taaki sabko barabar weightage mile. \n3. Extra Fact: Iske liye abhi bhi 1971 ki census ka data use hota hai.

q: Who is the 'Supreme Commander' of the Defense Forces in India? / भारत में रक्षा बलों का 'सर्वोच्च कमांडर' कौन है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Civilian control over military. \n2. Logic: Military hamesha chune hue head ke niche honi chahiye. \n3. Extra Fact: President hi teeno senaon (Army, Navy, Airforce) ke chief ko appoint karte hain.

q: Can the President return a 'Money Bill' for reconsideration? / क्या राष्ट्रपति 'धन विधेयक' को पुनर्विचार के लिए वापस भेज सकते हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Financial control of Lok Sabha. \n2. Logic: Money Bill (Art 110) hamesha President ki 'Prior Recommendation' (pehle se li gayi ijazat) se hi pesh hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Isliye President ise ya toh sign karte hain ya reject, par 'Reconsider' ke liye wapas nahi bhej sakte.

q: Under Article 356, the 'President's Rule' is imposed in a State on which ground? / अनुच्छेद 356 के तहत, किसी राज्य में 'राष्ट्रपति शासन' किस आधार पर लगाया जाता है?
o: Failure of Constitutional Machinery (संवैधानिक तंत्र की विफलता)
e: 1. Core Concept: State govt vs Constitution. \n2. Logic: Agar koi State Govt Samvidhan ke hisab se nahi chal rahi (jaise election ke baad koi sarkar na ban paye), toh Governor ki report par President wahan ka control le lete hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Bihar mein ab tak 8 baar President's Rule lag chuka hai.

q: What is the maximum 'Gap' between two sessions of Parliament according to Article 85? / अनुच्छेद 85 के अनुसार संसद के दो सत्रों के बीच अधिकतम कितना 'अंतर' हो सकता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Regularity of Parliament. \n2. Logic: President session bulata hai (Summon) aur use samapt (Prorogue) karta hai. Do session ke beech 6 mahine se zyada ka gap nahi hona chahiye. \n3. Extra Fact: Iska matlab hai ki saal mein kam se kam 2 baar Sansad ki baithak zaroori hai.

q: The President of India is elected by 'Proportional Representation' through: / भारत के राष्ट्रपति का चुनाव 'आनुपातिक प्रतिनिधित्व' के माध्यम से कैसे होता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Secret Ballot System. \n2. Logic: Voter (MP/MLA) candidates ko preference (1, 2, 3) dete hain. Agar kisi ko 50% + 1 vote (Quota) mil jaye, toh wo jeet jata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye system isliye hai taaki winner ko 'Absolute Majority' mile.

q: Who decides the 'Election Disputes' related to the President? / राष्ट्रपति से संबंधित 'चुनाव विवादों' का निर्णय कौन करता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Judicial Review of Election. \n2. Logic: Article 71 kehta hai ki agar President ya Vice-President ke election mein koi gadbadi ho, toh sirf SC hi use check karega. \n3. Extra Fact: SC ka faisla aakhri (final) hota hai.

q: If the President and Vice-President both are unavailable, who acts as President? / यदि राष्ट्रपति और उपराष्ट्रपति दोनों अनुपलब्ध हों, तो राष्ट्रपति के रूप में कौन कार्य करता है?
o: Chief Justice of India (भारत के मुख्य न्यायाधीश)
e: 1. Core Concept: Line of Succession. \n2. Logic: Desh ka head pad khali nahi reh sakta. \n3. Extra Fact: 1969 mein Justice M. Hidayatullah akele aise CJI the jo Acting President bane.

q: The President nominates how many members to the 'Rajya Sabha'? / राष्ट्रपति 'राज्यसभा' में कितने सदस्यों को मनोनीत करते हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Merit in Parliament. \n2. Logic: Art, Science, Literature aur Social Service ke experts ko bina election ke Parliament bheja jata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Pehle 2 Anglo-Indians ko Lok Sabha mein nominate karte the, par ab wo (104th Amendment se) band ho gaya hai.

q: Which Article says 'There shall be a Council of Ministers with PM to aid and advise the President'? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद कहता है कि 'राष्ट्रपति को सहायता और सलाह देने के लिए पीएम के साथ एक मंत्रिपरिषद होगी'?
e: 1. Core Concept: Real vs Nominal Head. \n2. Logic: President sirf ek 'Nominal Head' (naam ka pramukh) hai. Asli power Cabinet ke paas hai. \n3. Extra Fact: 42nd Amendment ke baad President Cabinet ki advice manne ke liye majboor (bound) hai.

q: What is the 'Qualification' age for becoming the President of India? / भारत का राष्ट्रपति बनने के लिए 'योग्यता' आयु क्या है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Eligibility Criteria. \n2. Logic: Itne bade pad ke liye 'Maturity' zaroori hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Iske alawa wo Lok Sabha ka member banne ki kabiliyat rakhna chahiye aur 'Office of Profit' par nahi hona chahiye.

q: The President's 'Veto Power' over State legislation is under which Article? / राज्य विधान पर राष्ट्रपति की 'वीटो शक्ति' किस अनुच्छेद के तहत है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Control over States. \n2. Logic: Agar Governor kisi State Bill ko President ke liye 'Reserve' kar deta hai, toh President use mana kar sakte hain. \n3. Extra Fact: State Bill par President 'Pocket Veto' bhi use kar sakte hain.

q: Under Article 72, what is 'Respite' (विराम) in Pardoning power? / अनुच्छेद 72 के तहत, क्षमादान शक्ति में 'विराम' (Respite) क्या है?
o: Less punishment due to special facts (विशेष तथ्यों के कारण कम सजा)
e: 1. Core Concept: Humanitarian grounds. \n2. Logic: Agar koi kaidi 'Pregnant' hai ya 'Disabled' (viklang) hai, toh uski saza ko thoda kam ya naram kar diya jata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: 'Commutation' ka matlab hota hai saza ka 'Nature' badalna (Death to Life imprisonment).

q: The 'Report of CAG' (Comptroller and Auditor General) is submitted to? / CAG की रिपोर्ट किसे सौंपी जाती है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Accountability of Finance. \n2. Logic: President is report ko 'Parliament' ke dono houses ke samne rakhwate hain. \n3. Extra Fact: CAG ko 'Friend, Philosopher and Guide' of PAC (Public Accounts Committee) kaha jata hai.

q: Who appoints the 'Attorney General of India'? / भारत के 'महान्यायवादी' (Attorney General) की नियुक्ति कौन करता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Legal Advisor to Govt. \n2. Logic: Attorney General (Art 76) President ke 'Pleasure' (prasad-paryant) tak hi pad par rehte hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Wo India ke kisi bhi court mein sunvai kar sakte hain aur Parliament ki proceedings mein baith sakte hain.

q: Article 111 deals with: / अनुच्छेद 111 किससे संबंधित है?
o: President's Assent to Bills (विधेयकों पर राष्ट्रपति की सहमति)
e: 1. Core Concept: Legislative process end. \n2. Logic: Jab Sansad bill pass karti hai, toh wo Art 111 ke tehat President ke paas jata hai sign hone. \n3. Extra Fact: President ke sign ke bina koi bhi bill 'Act' (Kanoon) nahi banta.

q: The President can declare 'Financial Emergency' under which Article? / राष्ट्रपति किस अनुच्छेद के तहत 'वित्तीय आपातकाल' घोषित कर सकते हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Economic crisis. \n2. Logic: Agar desh ki financial stability khatre mein ho, toh President salaries kam karne ka order de sakte hain. \n3. Extra Fact: India mein aaj tak ek baar bhi 'Financial Emergency' nahi lagi hai.

q: How many times can a person be re-elected as the President of India? / एक व्यक्ति कितनी बार भारत के राष्ट्रपति के रूप में फिर से निर्वाचित हो सकता है?
o: Any number of times (कितनी भी बार)
e: 1. Core Concept: Re-election eligibility. \n2. Logic: Article 57 kehta hai ki koi bhi insaan jitni baar chahe President ban sakta hai (agar wo chuna jaye). \n3. Extra Fact: USA mein ek insaan sirf 'Do baar' (2 terms) hi President ban sakta hai.

q: What is 'Suspensive Veto' (निलंबनकारी वीटो)? / 'निलंबनकारी वीटो' (Suspensive Veto) क्या है?
o: Returning the bill for reconsideration (पुनर्विचार के लिए विधेयक वापस करना)
e: 1. Core Concept: Check on Parliament's haste. \n2. Logic: President bill wapas bhejte hain, par agar Sansad wahi bill dobara pass kar de, toh President ko sign karna hi padta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye veto 'Money Bill' par use nahi kiya ja sakta.

q: Which Article empowers the President to appoint a Commission for SC/ST? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद राष्ट्रपति को SC/ST के लिए आयोग नियुक्त करने की शक्ति देता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Protection of Weaker Sections. \n2. Logic: President hi National Commission for SC aur ST ke members ko appoint karte hain. \n3. Extra Fact: National Commission for OBC (338B) bhi President hi banate hain.

q: The President's 'Executive Power' includes the appointment of: / राष्ट्रपति की 'कार्यकारी शक्ति' में किसकी नियुक्ति शामिल है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Appointment powers. \n2. Logic: Desh ke lagbhag sabhi bade constitutional heads President dwara hi appoint kiye jate hain. \n3. Extra Fact: In sabhi ko hatane ka tarika alag-alag hota hai (kuch ko President khud, kuch ko Parliament).

q: Who addresses the first session of Parliament after each General Election? / प्रत्येक आम चुनाव के बाद संसद के पहले सत्र को कौन संबोधित करता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Special Address. \n2. Logic: Har naye saal ka pehla session aur har election ke baad ka pehla session President ke 'Address' se shuru hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye address 'Cabinet' dwara likha jata hai aur sarkar ki policies batata hai.

q: Article 60 deals with the 'Oath of the President'. What does he swear to protect? / अनुच्छेद 60 राष्ट्रपति की 'शपथ' से संबंधित है। वह किसकी रक्षा करने की कसम खाता है?
o: The Constitution and the Law (संविधान और कानून)
e: 1. Core Concept: Defender of Constitution. \n2. Logic: President ki shapath baaki logo se alag hai, wo 'Preserve, Protect and Defend' the Constitution kehte hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Isi shapath ki wajah se unhe Samvidhan ka rakshak mana jata hai.

q: The 'Mercy Petition' (दया याचिका) after a death sentence is filed to? / मृत्युदंड के बाद 'दया याचिका' किसके पास दायर की जाती है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Final hope for life. \n2. Logic: Judiciary ke baad ye Executive (President) ki power hai saza maaf karne ki. \n3. Extra Fact: Home Ministry is par apni recommendation deti hai, par sign President karte hain.

q: Which Fundamental Right can NEVER be suspended by the President during Emergency? / आपातकाल के दौरान राष्ट्रपति द्वारा कौन सा मौलिक अधिकार कभी निलंबित नहीं किया जा सकता?
e: 1. Core Concept: Inalienable Rights. \n2. Logic: 44th Amendment ne pakka kiya ki kisi bhi halat mein 'Jaan' (Life) aur 'Trial' ki suraksha nahi chhini jayegi. \n3. Extra Fact: Article 19 sabhi emergency mein suspend nahi hota (Art 358 dekhein).

q: The Vice-President acts as President when the office is vacant. For how long? / पद खाली होने पर उपराष्ट्रपति राष्ट्रपति के रूप में कार्य करता है। कब तक?
e: 1. Core Concept: Time limit for election. \n2. Logic: Article 62 kehta hai ki 6 mahine ke andar naya election karwana zaroori hai. \n3. Extra Fact: USA mein Vice President bache hue poore term ke liye President ban jata hai.

q: Who was the only President of India elected 'Unopposed'? / निर्विरोध (Unopposed) चुने गए भारत के एकमात्र राष्ट्रपति कौन थे?
e: 1. Core Concept: Historical consensus. \n2. Logic: 1977 mein unke khilaaf kisi ne parcha nahi bhara (ya radd ho gaya), isliye wo bina election ke jeet gaye. \n3. Extra Fact: Wo sabse kam umra ke President bhi rahe hain.

q: Under Article 53, the 'Executive Power' of the Union is vested in? / अनुच्छेद 53 के तहत, संघ की 'कार्यकारी शक्ति' किसमें निहित है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Source of Power. \n2. Logic: Bharat sarkar ka har kaam President ke naam par hi hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Halanki wo ise Cabinet ki advice se hi use karte hain.

q: Which Article deals with 'Special Address' by the President? / राष्ट्रपति द्वारा 'विशेष संबोधन' से कौन सा अनुच्छेद संबंधित है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Opening of Parliament. \n2. Logic: Ye address General Election ke baad aur har saal ke pehle session mein hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ise 'Motion of Thanks' (Dhanyavad Prastav) ke baad pass kiya jata hai.

q: Who appoints the 'Finance Commission' every 5 years? / हर 5 साल में 'वित्त आयोग' की नियुक्ति कौन करता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Tax distribution. \n2. Logic: Article 280 ke tehat President hi FC banate hain jo Centre aur State ke beech paisa bat-ne ki report deta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme ek Chairman aur 4 members hote hain.

q: The President's resignation is addressed to? / राष्ट्रपति का इस्तीफा किसे संबोधित किया जाता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Mutual exchange. \n2. Logic: President VP ko resign deta hai, aur VP President ko. \n3. Extra Fact: VP iski suchna turant 'Speaker of Lok Sabha' ko deta hai.

q: What is 'Pro-tem Speaker'? / 'प्रोटेम स्पीकर' (Pro-tem Speaker) क्या है?
o: Temporary speaker appointed by President (राष्ट्रपति द्वारा नियुक्त अस्थायी अध्यक्ष)
e: 1. Core Concept: Filling the gap. \n2. Logic: Nayi Lok Sabha ke election ke baad, members ko shapath dilane ke liye President senior-most member ko Pro-tem speaker banate hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Jaise hi naya Speaker chuna jata hai, Pro-tem speaker ka pad khatam ho jata hai.

q: Which Article gives the President power to 'Summon' a Joint Sitting? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद राष्ट्रपति को 'संयुक्त बैठक' बुलाने की शक्ति देता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Resolving Deadlock. \n2. Logic: Agar LS aur RS ke beech kisi bill par jhagda ho jaye, toh President dono ko ek sath bulate hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Iski 'Preside' (adhyakshta) Lok Sabha ka Speaker karta hai, President nahi.

q: Can the President dissolve the 'Rajya Sabha'? / क्या राष्ट्रपति 'राज्यसभा' को भंग कर सकते हैं?
o: No, it is a permanent body (नहीं, यह एक स्थायी निकाय है)
e: 1. Core Concept: Nature of Houses. \n2. Logic: Lok Sabha bhang ho sakti hai, par Rajya Sabha kabhi bhang nahi hoti. Iske 1/3 members har 2 saal mein retire hote hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Rajya Sabha ko 'Upper House' ya 'Council of States' kehte hain.

q: The 'Diplomatic Powers' of the President include: / राष्ट्रपति की 'राजनयिक शक्तियों' में शामिल हैं:
o: Signing International Treaties in his name
e: 1. Core Concept: Foreign relations. \n2. Logic: Videshi rajdooto ko bulana aur apne rajdooto ko bhejna President ka kaam hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Halanki treaties ke liye Parliament ki approval zaroori hoti hai.

q: Which Article deals with 'Information to be furnished to the President' by the PM? / पीएम द्वारा राष्ट्रपति को दी जाने वाली जानकारी से कौन सा अनुच्छेद संबंधित है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Communication Link. \n2. Logic: PM ka farz hai ki wo Cabinet ke saare faisle President ko batayein. \n3. Extra Fact: President khud bhi kisi maamle par jankari maang sakte hain.

q: The President's 'Salary' is charged upon which fund? / राष्ट्रपति का 'वेतन' किस निधि पर भारित होता है?
o: Consolidated Fund of India (भारत की संचित निधि)
e: 1. Core Concept: Financial Security. \n2. Logic: Iska matlab hai ki unki salary par Parliament mein vote nahi hota, wo hamesha milti rahegi. \n3. Extra Fact: Filhal President ki salary ₹5 Lakh per month hai.

q: Can the President be arrested during his term of office? / क्या राष्ट्रपति को उनके कार्यकाल के दौरान गिरफ्तार किया जा सकता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Criminal Immunity. \n2. Logic: Article 361 ke tehat President ke khilaaf koi criminal case ya arrest warrant nahi nikala ja sakta jab tak wo pad par hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Civil case ke liye 2 mahine ka 'Notice' dena padta hai.

q: The first President of India, Dr. Rajendra Prasad, belonged to which state? / भारत के पहले राष्ट्रपति डॉ. राजेंद्र प्रसाद किस राज्य से थे?
e: 1. Core Concept: Bihar Pride. \n2. Logic: Wo Siwan (Bihar) ke rehne wale the aur sabse lambe samay (12 saal) tak President rahe. \n3. Extra Fact: Unhe 'Desh Ratna' aur 'Ajatshatru' bhi kaha jata hai.

q: Which Article provides for the 'Office of the Vice-President'? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद 'उपराष्ट्रपति के पद' का प्रावधान करता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Second highest office. \n2. Logic: Ye pad humne USA se liya hai. \n3. Extra Fact: VP hi Rajya Sabha ka 'Ex-officio Chairman' hota hai.

q: What happens if a Bill is reserved by the Governor for President's consideration? / यदि राज्यपाल राष्ट्रपति के विचार के लिए विधेयक सुरक्षित रखता है तो क्या होता है?
o: President can reject or return multiple times (राष्ट्रपति अस्वीकार या बार-बार वापस कर सकते हैं)
e: 1. Core Concept: Unitary bias. \n2. Logic: State Bills par President ki power Parliament ke bills se zyada hai. Wo ise kitni bhi baar wapas bhej sakte hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme Art 201 ka use hota hai.

q: Who is the only President to use 'Pocket Veto' in India? / भारत में 'पॉकेट वीटो' का उपयोग करने वाले एकमात्र राष्ट्रपति कौन हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Veto history. \n2. Logic: Unhone Indian Post Office (Amendment) Bill par koi action nahi liya, jisse wo bill khatam ho gaya. \n3. Extra Fact: Us waqt Rajiv Gandhi ki sarkar thi.

q: Who presides over the 'Joint Sitting' of the two Houses of Parliament? / संसद के दोनों सदनों की 'संयुक्त बैठक' की अध्यक्षता कौन करता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Article 108 ke tehat deadlock todne ke liye Joint Sitting hoti hai. \n2. Logic: President ise bulate (Summon) hain, par adhyakshta Speaker karta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Agar Speaker na ho, toh Deputy Speaker adhyakshta karta hai, par Rajya Sabha ka Chairman kabhi nahi.

q: A 'Money Bill' can be introduced only in: / 'धन विधेयक' केवल कहाँ पेश किया जा सकता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Paiso par 'Janata' ka adhikar hai, isliye chune hue sadan (LS) mein hi ye aata hai. \n2. Logic: Article 110 ke tehat ise sirf Lok Sabha mein hi laya ja sakta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ise pesh karne ke liye President ki pehle se ijazat (Prior Recommendation) zaroori hai.

q: What is the 'Quorum' required to hold a meeting of either House of Parliament? / संसद के किसी भी सदन की बैठक के लिए आवश्यक 'कोरम' क्या है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Baithak shuru karne ke liye minimum sadasyo ki sankhya. \n2. Logic: Article 100 ke tehat kam se kam 10% sadasya hone hi chahiye. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme Speaker ya Chairman ko bhi gina jata hai.

q: Which House of Parliament is called the 'Permanent House'? / संसद के किस सदन को 'स्थायी सदन' कहा जाता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Continuity of Parliament. \n2. Logic: Rajya Sabha kabhi bhang (dissolve) nahi hoti. \n3. Extra Fact: Iske 1/3 sadasya har do saal mein retire hote hain, isliye ye hamesha chalti rehti hai.

q: The 'Public Accounts Committee' (PAC) consists of how many members? / 'लोक लेखा समिति' (PAC) में कितने सदस्य होते हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Financial Watchdog. \n2. Logic: Isme dono sadno ke sadasya hote hain (15 Lok Sabha aur 7 Rajya Sabha). \n3. Extra Fact: Iska mukhya kaam CAG ki report ko check karna hai taaki sarkari kharch ki jaanch ho sake.

q: The 'Zero Hour' in Parliament starts at what time? / संसद में 'शून्य काल' किस समय शुरू होता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Informal discussion time. \n2. Logic: Question Hour (11-12) khatam hote hi 12 baje Zero Hour shuru hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye India ki apni khoj (Innovation) hai, ye kisi aur desh se nahi liya gaya.

q: Article 312 empowers Rajya Sabha to create: / अनुच्छेद 312 राज्यसभा को क्या बनाने की शक्ति देता है?
o: New All India Services (नई अखिल भारतीय सेवाएं)
e: 1. Core Concept: Federal Power of Rajya Sabha. \n2. Logic: Rajya Sabha 'States' ko represent karti hai, isliye IAS/IPS jaisi nayi services shuru karne ka adhikar use diya gaya hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Abhi tak IAS, IPS aur IFoS hi All India Services hain.

q: Who decides whether a bill is a 'Money Bill' or not? / कौन तय करता है कि कोई विधेयक 'धन विधेयक' है या नहीं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Certification power. \n2. Logic: Speaker ka faisla aakhri hota hai aur use kisi court mein challenge nahi kiya ja sakta. \n3. Extra Fact: Jab bill Rajya Sabha jata hai, toh Speaker use sign karke bhejta hai.

q: The 'Estimate Committee' is composed of members from: / 'अनुमान समिति' किन सदस्यों से बनी होती है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Largest Parliamentary Committee. \n2. Logic: Isme 30 sadasya hote hain aur sabhi sirf Lok Sabha se hote hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye samiti sarkar ke kharch mein 'Economy' lane ke tarike sujhati hai.

q: The maximum number of elected members in Lok Sabha is: / लोकसभा में निर्वाचित सदस्यों की अधिकतम संख्या कितनी है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Representation of People. \n2. Logic: Filhal 543 seats par election hote hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Pehle 2 seats Anglo-Indians ke liye thi, par ab wo 104th Amendment se khatam kar di gayi hain.

q: What is the 'Lame Duck' session of Parliament? / संसद का 'लेम डक' सत्र क्या है?
o: The last session before a new Lok Sabha is elected (नई लोकसभा से पहले का अंतिम सत्र)
e: 1. Core Concept: Final meeting of outgoing members. \n2. Logic: Isme wo sadasya hote hain jo agle election mein dobara nahi chune gaye. \n3. Extra Fact: Un sadasyo ko hi 'Lame Ducks' kaha jata hai.

q: Article 112 of the Constitution refers to: / संविधान का अनुच्छेद 112 किससे संबंधित है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Government Finances. \n2. Logic: Samvidhan mein 'Budget' shabd nahi hai, uski jagah 'Annual Financial Statement' likha hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye sarkar ke aane wale saal ki kamayi aur kharch ka byora hota hai.

q: A member of Parliament (MP) loses his seat if he is absent without permission for: / एक सांसद अपनी सीट खो देता है यदि वह बिना अनुमति के कितने समय तक अनुपस्थित रहता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Attendance in Parliament. \n2. Logic: Agar koi MP bina bataye 60 din tak sessions mein nahi aata, toh uski seat khali (vacant) mani jati hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme wo samiti (recess) ka samay nahi gina jata jab sadan adjourn ho.

q: Who is the 'Ex-officio Chairman' of the Rajya Sabha? / राज्यसभा का 'पदेन सभापति' कौन होता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Two roles of one office. \n2. Logic: Jo bhi Bharat ka Vice-President banega, wo apne aap Rajya Sabha ka Chairman ban jayega. \n3. Extra Fact: Use salary Vice-President ke liye nahi, balki Chairman ke roop mein kaam karne ke liye milti hai.

q: The 'Question Hour' is usually held at: / 'प्रश्नकाल' आमतौर पर कब आयोजित किया जाता है?
o: The last hour of the day
The first hour of a sitting (बैठक का पहला घंटा)
e: 1. Core Concept: Accountability of Ministers. \n2. Logic: Subah 11 baje sadan shuru hote hi pehla ghanta sawal-jawab ke liye hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme 'Starred' (moukhik) aur 'Unstarred' (written) dono tarah ke sawal hote hain.

q: Which bill can originate in either house but requires no 'Joint Sitting'? / कौन सा विधेयक किसी भी सदन में शुरू हो सकता है लेकिन इसके लिए 'संयुक्त बैठक' का प्रावधान नहीं है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Equality of Houses in Amendments. \n2. Logic: Article 368 ke tehat dono houses ko alag-alag bill pass karna hi padega. Agar takrav hua toh bill radd ho jayega, Joint Sitting nahi hogi. \n3. Extra Fact: Money bill par bhi joint sitting nahi hoti, par wo sirf Lok Sabha mein shuru hota hai.

q: The 'Panel of Chairpersons' in Lok Sabha is nominated by: / लोकसभा में 'सभापति तालिका' का नामांकन किसके द्वारा किया जाता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Backup for Speaker. \n2. Logic: Jab Speaker aur Deputy Speaker dono nahi hote, toh is panel mein se koi ek sadan chalata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme adhiktam 10 sadasya ho sakte hain.

q: Article 105 deals with: / अनुच्छेद 105 किससे संबंधित है?
o: Powers and Privileges of Parliament (संसद की शक्तियाँ और विशेषाधिकार)
e: 1. Core Concept: Parliamentary Immunity. \n2. Logic: MPs ko sadan ke andar kuch bhi bolne par court mein nahi ghaseeta ja sakta. \n3. Extra Fact: Iska maksad bina kisi dar ke MPs ko apni baat rakhne ki azadi dena hai.

q: In the Rajya Sabha, the members are elected for a term of: / राज्यसभा में सदस्य कितनी अवधि के लिए चुने जाते हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Fixed tenure for members. \n2. Logic: Halanki sadan permanent hai, par sadasyo ka term 6 saal hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Har do saal mein 1/3 sadasya retire hote hain.

q: What is the maximum strength of the Rajya Sabha? / राज्यसभा की अधिकतम सदस्य संख्या कितनी है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Fixed upper limit. \n2. Logic: Article 80 ke tehat 250 seats hain (238 elected + 12 nominated). \n3. Extra Fact: Filhal 245 seats bhari hui hain. Bihar ki 16 seats isi ka hissa hain.

q: Which of the following is NOT a Parliamentary Committee? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी एक संसदीय समिति नहीं है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Difference between Parliament and Executive. \n2. Logic: Cabinet committees sarkar (Executive) banati hai, jabki Parliamentary committees Sansad ke members se banti hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Parliamentary committees do tarah ki hoti hain: Standing (Permanent) aur Ad-hoc (Temporary).

q: What is a 'Guillotine' in parliamentary procedure? / संसदीय प्रक्रिया में 'गिलोटिन' क्या है?
o: Passing all remaining demands for grants without discussion (बिना चर्चा के सभी अनुदान मांगों को पारित करना)
e: 1. Core Concept: Time management during Budget. \n2. Logic: Budget session ke aakhri din, samay bachane ke liye bachi hui sabhi demands par bina behes ke voting kara li jati hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye Speaker ki power hoti hai session ko time par conclude karne ke liye.

q: The 'Privilege Motion' can be moved against: / 'विशेषाधिकार प्रस्ताव' किसके खिलाफ लाया जा सकता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Accountability of facts. \n2. Logic: Agar koi mantri sadan mein galat ya adhura tathya (fact) deta hai, toh koi bhi member privilege motion la sakta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Iski jaanch 'Privileges Committee' karti hai.

q: Which Article allows the President to call a 'Joint Sitting'? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद राष्ट्रपति को 'संयुक्त बैठक' बुलाने की अनुमति देता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Breaking a deadlock. \n2. Logic: Jab ek house bill pass kare aur dusra reject karde, toh President dono ko sath bulate hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Money Bill aur Constitutional Amendment Bill par kabhi Joint Sitting nahi ho sakti.

q: Who is the 'Leader of the House' in Rajya Sabha? / राज्यसभा में 'सदन का नेता' कौन होता है?
o: Prime Minister or a Minister nominated by him (पीएम या उनके द्वारा नामित मंत्री)
e: 1. Core Concept: Coordination in House. \n2. Logic: Agar PM Rajya Sabha ke member hain toh wo leader honge, warna wo kisi aur mantri ko nominate karte hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Lok Sabha mein leader hamesha PM hi hote hain (agar wo member hain).

q: The 'Censure Motion' must state the reasons for its adoption. / 'निंदा प्रस्ताव' में इसे अपनाने के कारणों का उल्लेख होना चाहिए।
e: 1. Core Concept: Criticizing the government. \n2. Logic: No-confidence motion mein reason batana zaroori nahi, par Censure motion mein specific galti batani padti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Iske pass hone par sarkar ko istifa (resign) dene ki zaroorat nahi hoti.

q: Article 110 defines Money Bill. Who has the final authority to certify it? / अनुच्छेद 110 धन विधेयक को परिभाषित करता है। इसे प्रमाणित करने का अंतिम अधिकार किसके पास है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Financial supremacy of LS. \n2. Logic: Speaker ka certificate aakhri hota hai aur use court mein challenge nahi kiya ja sakta. \n3. Extra Fact: Rajya Sabha is bill ko sirf 14 din tak rok sakti hai.

q: Which committee is called the 'Twin Sister' of the Public Accounts Committee? / किस समिति को लोक लेखा समिति की 'जुड़वां बहन' कहा जाता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Financial scrutiny committees. \n2. Logic: Dono committees (PAC aur Estimate) sarkari kharch aur efficiency par dhyan deti hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Estimate committee sansad ki sabse badi samiti (30 members) hai.

q: A member can be disqualified from Parliament under the 'Anti-Defection Law' (10th Schedule) if: / 'दलबदल विरोधी कानून' के तहत एक सदस्य को अयोग्य घोषित किया जा सकता है यदि:
o: He joins another party after election
An independent member joins a party
e: 1. Core Concept: Maintaining party discipline. \n2. Logic: 52nd Amendment se ise joda gaya taaki 'Aaya Ram Gaya Ram' wali rajneeti ruke. \n3. Extra Fact: Iska faisla Speaker ya Chairman lete hain.

q: What is the 'Rule of Lapse' in Indian Parliament? / भारतीय संसद में 'व्यपगत का नियम' (Rule of Lapse) क्या hai?
o: Unspent money at the end of financial year expires (वित्तीय वर्ष के अंत में बिना खर्च किया पैसा समाप्त हो जाता है)
e: 1. Core Concept: Financial accountability. \n2. Logic: Agar budget ka paisa 31 March tak kharch nahi hua, toh wo wapas Consolidated Fund mein chala jata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ise 'March Rush' ka ek mukhya karan mana jata hai.

q: Article 123 gives the President power to issue Ordinances. What is its maximum life? / अनुच्छेद 123 राष्ट्रपति को अध्यादेश जारी करने की शक्ति देता है। इसकी अधिकतम अवधि क्या है?
o: 6 months and 6 weeks (6 महीने और 6 हफ्ते)
e: 1. Core Concept: Temporary laws. \n2. Logic: Do session ke beech max gap 6 month hota hai aur session shuru hone ke 6 hafte ke andar ise pass hona chahiye. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye power tabhi use hoti hai jab Sansad ke dono houses session mein na hon.

q: Who is the 'Ex-officio Chairman' of the Rajya Sabha? / राज्यसभा का 'पदेन सभापति' कौन होता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Double role of Vice President. \n2. Logic: Article 64 ke tehat jo bhi VP banega, wo RS ka chairman bhi hoga. \n3. Extra Fact: Use salary VP ke liye nahi, balki RS Chairman ke liye milti hai.

q: In which house of Parliament the 'Leader of Opposition' was first recognized? / संसद के किस सदन में 'विपक्ष के नेता' को पहली बार मान्यता दी गई थी?
e: 1. Core Concept: Parliamentary democracy. \n2. Logic: 1969 mein pehli baar official recognition mili. \n3. Extra Fact: LOP banne ke liye party ke paas kam se kam 10% seats honi chahiye.

q: What is the 'Motion of Thanks' in Parliament? / संसद में 'धन्यवाद प्रस्ताव' क्या है?
o: Discussion on President's address (राष्ट्रपति के अभिभाषण पर चर्चा)
e: 1. Core Concept: Approval of Govt's vision. \n2. Logic: General election ke baad pehle session mein President address karte hain, jispar vote hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Agar ye pass nahi hota, toh mana jata hai ki sarkar ke paas bahumat nahi hai.

q: Article 102 deals with the 'Disqualification' of MPs. Who has the final power? / अनुच्छेद 102 सांसदों की 'अयोग्यता' से संबंधित है। अंतिम शक्ति किसके पास है?
o: President after consulting Election Commission (चुनाव आयोग की सलाह पर राष्ट्रपति)
e: 1. Core Concept: Removal process. \n2. Logic: Office of profit ya mental health ke ground par President faisla lete hain EC ki advice par. \n3. Extra Fact: Defection (dal-badal) ke case mein Speaker faisla lete hain.

q: The 'Question Hour' in Parliament usually lasts for: / संसद में 'प्रश्नकाल' आमतौर पर कितनी देर चलता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Accountability start. \n2. Logic: Sadan ki baithak ka pehla ghanta sawal-jawab ke liye hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme 'Starred' (oral) aur 'Unstarred' (written) sawal puche jate hain.

q: Which of these bills does NOT require the prior recommendation of the President? / इनमें से किस विधेयक को राष्ट्रपति की पूर्व सिफारिश की आवश्यकता नहीं है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Amendment independence. \n2. Logic: Article 368 ke tehat amendment bill bina kisi prior recommendation ke laya ja sakta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Lekin pass hone ke baad President ko ispar sign karna hi padta hai (obligatory).

q: The 'Consolidated Fund of India' (Art 266) is under the control of: / 'भारत की संसंचित निधि' किसके नियंत्रण में है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Power of the purse. \n2. Logic: Bina Sansad ki ijazat (Appropriation Bill) ke is fund se ek rupaya bhi nahi nikala ja sakta. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme sarkar ki saari kamayi (Taxes etc.) jama hoti hai.

q: What is 'Point of Order' in Parliament? / संसद में 'औचित्य का प्रश्न' (Point of Order) क्या है?
o: A way to start a bill
Raising a violation of house rules (सदन के नियमों के उल्लंघन का मुद्दा उठाना)
e: 1. Core Concept: Maintaining discipline. \n2. Logic: Jab koi sadasya dekhta hai ki sadan ke rules follow nahi ho rahe, toh wo 'Point of Order' uthata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Is par koi behes nahi hoti, Speaker turant faisla deta hai.

q: Who is the 'Ex-officio Chairman' of the Estimates Committee? / प्राक्कलन समिति का 'पदेन अध्यक्ष' कौन होता है?
o: A member appointed by Speaker (स्पीकर द्वारा नियुक्त सदस्य)
e: 1. Core Concept: Appointment of Committees. \n2. Logic: Iska adhyaksh hamesha ruling party se hota hai taaki kharch mein bachati sujhai ja sake. \n3. Extra Fact: Is committee mein sirf Lok Sabha ke member hote hain.

q: The 'Rajya Sabha' has equal powers with Lok Sabha in: / राज्यसभा की शक्तियां लोकसभा के बराबर किस मामले में हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Constitutional equality. \n2. Logic: Rashtrapati ke election aur impeachment mein dono sadno ki value barabar hoti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Samvidhan Sanshodhan (Amendment) mein bhi dono barabar hain.

q: A member of Parliament can be arrested in a civil case during the session. / संसद के सत्र के दौरान एक सांसद को दीवानी मामले में गिरफ्तार किया जा सकता है।
e: 1. Core Concept: Parliamentary Privilege. \n2. Logic: Session se 40 din pehle aur 40 din baad tak 'Civil' cases mein arrest se immunity hoti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: 'Criminal' cases mein aisi koi immunity nahi milti.

q: Article 114 is related to which bill? / अनुच्छेद 114 किस विधेयक से संबंधित है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Legal power to spend. \n2. Logic: Appropriation Bill pass hone ke baad hi sarkar Consolidated Fund se paisa nikal sakti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ise 'Power of the Purse' ka mukhya hissa mana jata hai.

q: How many members are nominated by the President in the 'Public Accounts Committee'? / 'लोक लेखा समिति' में राष्ट्रपति द्वारा कितने सदस्य मनोनीत किए जाते हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Elected nature of committees. \n2. Logic: Isme sadasyo ka 'Election' hota hai (Proportional Representation se), nomination nahi. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme 15 LS aur 7 RS ke sadasya hote hain.

q: The 'Whip' in Parliament is responsible for: / संसद में 'सचेतक' (Whip) किसके लिए जिम्मेदार है?
o: Ensuring party discipline and attendance (पार्टी अनुशासन और उपस्थिति सुनिश्चित करना)
e: 1. Core Concept: Party coordination. \n2. Logic: Whip party sadasyo ko nirdesh deta hai ki kab aur kis side vote karna hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Whip ke order ko na manna 'Defection' (dal-badal) ka ground ban sakta hai.

q: What is 'Vote on Account' (Art 116)? / 'लेखानुदान' (Vote on Account) क्या है?
o: Interim grant to run govt until budget is passed (बजट पारित होने तक सरकार चलाने के लिए अंतरिम अनुदान)
e: 1. Core Concept: Advance payment. \n2. Logic: Budget pass hone mein time lagta hai, isliye 2 mahine ka kharch pehle hi le liya jata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye sirf 'Expenditure' (kharch) ke liye hota hai.

q: The 'Rajya Sabha' can delay a Money Bill for how many days? / राज्यसभा धन विधेयक को कितने दिनों तक विलंबित कर सकती है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Speed of Finance. \n2. Logic: Agar 14 din mein wapas nahi bheja, toh wo automatically pass mana jata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: RS isme badlav (amendments) sirf 'Suggest' kar sakti hai, force nahi.

q: Which Parliamentary Committee has no member from Rajya Sabha? / किस संसदीय समिति में राज्यसभा का कोई सदस्य नहीं होता?
e: 1. Core Concept: Lok Sabha supremacy in finance. \n2. Logic: Estimates committee sirf LS ke members (30) se banti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye committee 'Continuous Economy Committee' bhi kehlati hai.

q: The 'Speaker' of Lok Sabha can be removed by: / लोकसभा के अध्यक्ष को किसके द्वारा हटाया जा सकता है?
o: A resolution passed by majority of all members of LS (लोकसभा के सभी सदस्यों के बहुमत से पारित प्रस्ताव)
e: 1. Core Concept: Self-governance of House. \n2. Logic: Iske liye 14 din ka advance notice dena zaroori hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Jab ise hatane ka resolution chal raha ho, tab wo adhyakshta nahi kar sakta.

q: What is the 'Quorum' for the Joint Sitting of both houses? / दोनों सदनों की संयुक्त बैठक के लिए 'कोरम' क्या है?
o: 1/10 of total members of both houses (दोनों सदनों के कुल सदस्यों का 1/10)
e: 1. Core Concept: Collective presence. \n2. Logic: Dono houses ki kul sankhya (543 + 245) ka daswa hissa hona chahiye. \n3. Extra Fact: Is baithak ki rules Lok Sabha ke hisab se chalte hain.

q: The 'Language' of Parliament is mentioned in which Article? / संसद की 'भाषा' का उल्लेख किस अनुच्छेद में है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Medium of communication. \n2. Logic: Hindi aur English mukhya hain, par Speaker ki ijazat se 'Mother tongue' mein bhi bola ja sakta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Vidhan Sabha ke liye yahi rule Article 210 mein hai.

q: Who is the 'Administrative Head' of the Secretariat of Rajya Sabha? / राज्यसभा सचिवालय का 'प्रशासनिक प्रमुख' कौन होता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Support system of Parliament. \n2. Logic: Secretary General sadan ki karyawahi ko administrative support deta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Use Rajya Sabha ka Chairman (VP) appoint karta hai.

q: The 'Motion of Adjournment' requires the support of how many members? / 'स्थगन प्रस्ताव' के लिए कितने सदस्यों के समर्थन की आवश्यकता होती है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Serious discussions. \n2. Logic: 50 members ka support hone par hi ise admit kiya jata hai kyunki ye normal business ko rok deta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye sirf Lok Sabha mein laya ja sakta hai.

q: Which Article provides for the 'Salaries and Allowances' of MPs? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद सांसदों के 'वेतन और भत्तों' का प्रावधान करता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Remuneration. \n2. Logic: Sansad kanoon banakar apna vetan khud tay karti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Inki salary Consolidated Fund par 'Charged' nahi hoti (yani is par voting ho sakti hai).

q: What is 'Prorogation' of a house? / सदन का 'सत्रावसान' (Prorogation) क्या है?
o: Ending a sitting for the day
Ending a session of the house (सदन के सत्र का अंत)
e: 1. Core Concept: Session closure. \n2. Logic: Adjournment sirf baithak rokta hai, Prorogation poora session (Budget, Monsoon etc.) khatam karta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye kaam Rashtrapati karta hai.

q: Which bill does NOT lapse on the dissolution of Lok Sabha? / लोकसभा के भंग होने पर कौन सा विधेयक समाप्त नहीं होता है?
o: Bill passed by LS but pending in RS
Bill pending in RS and NOT passed by LS (राज्यसभा में लंबित और लोकसभा से पारित नहीं हुआ)
Bill passed by both but pending for President's assent
e: 1. Core Concept: Survival of Bills. \n2. Logic: Agar bill RS se shuru hua aur LS tak pahuncha hi nahi, toh LS bhang hone se use koi farq nahi padta. \n3. Extra Fact: President ke paas bheja gaya bill bhi kabhi lapse nahi hota.

q: The 'Business Advisory Committee' of Lok Sabha consists of how many members? / लोकसभा की 'कार्य मंत्रणा समिति' में कितने सदस्य होते हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Time table of the house. \n2. Logic: Ye committee tay karti hai ki kis kaam ko kitna samay dena hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Iska Chairman hamesha Speaker hota hai.

q: Article 82 deals with 'Readjustment after each Census'. What is it called? / अनुच्छेद 82 प्रत्येक जनगणना के बाद पुनर्समायोजन से संबंधित है। इसे क्या कहते हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Boundary adjustment. \n2. Logic: Population badhne par seats ki boundaries change ki jati hain taaki ek MP sab jagah barabar population represent kare. \n3. Extra Fact: Filhal 2026 tak seats fix kar di gayi hain.

q: Who is the 'Custodian' of the Lok Sabha? / लोकसभा का 'अभिरक्षक' (Custodian) कौन है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Guardian of the house. \n2. Logic: Speaker hi sadan ki maryada aur sadasyo ke adhikaaro ki raksha karta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Sadan ke andar uska faisla aakhri aur sarvopari hota hai.

q: What is the 'Calling Attention Motion'? / 'ध्यानाकर्षण प्रस्ताव' क्या है?
o: To draw minister's attention to an urgent public matter (मंत्री का ध्यान तत्काल सार्वजनिक मामले की ओर खींचना)
e: 1. Core Concept: Seeking official info. \n2. Logic: Iska maksad kisi urgent matter par mantri se official bayan lena hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye bhi India ki apni innovation hai (1954 se).

q: The 'Rajya Sabha' was first constituted in which year? / राज्यसभा का गठन पहली बार किस वर्ष किया गया था?
e: 1. Core Concept: History of Parliament. \n2. Logic: Pehle ise 'Council of States' kaha jata tha. \n3. Extra Fact: 1954 mein iska naam 'Rajya Sabha' rakha gaya.

q: Which Article gives the power of 'Punishment for Contempt' to Parliament? / संसद को 'अवमानना के लिए दंड' की शक्ति कौन सा अनुच्छेद देता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Parliamentary Privileges. \n2. Logic: Agar koi sansad ki maryada todta hai, toh Sansad use jail tak bhej sakti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye power 'Sovereign' nature ko protect karti hai.

q: What is 'Shadow Cabinet'? / 'शैडो कैबिनेट' (Shadow Cabinet) क्या है?
o: Opposition members monitoring specific ministries (विशिष्ट मंत्रालयों की निगरानी करने वाले विपक्षी सदस्य)
e: 1. Core Concept: British practice. \n2. Logic: Vipaksh har mantri ke liye apna ek 'Specialist' rakhta hai jo uske kamo par nazar rakhta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: India mein ye official nahi hai, par Britain mein bahut mazboot hai.

q: The 'Ethics Committee' of Lok Sabha was made permanent in? / लोकसभा की 'आचार समिति' को स्थायी कब बनाया गया?
e: 1. Core Concept: Behavior of MPs. \n2. Logic: Sansado ke achran (conduct) ki jaanch ke liye ise permanent kiya gaya. \n3. Extra Fact: Rajya Sabha mein ye 1997 se hi permanent hai.

q: Article 108 (Joint Sitting) is NOT applicable for: / अनुच्छेद 108 (संयुक्त बैठक) किसके लिए लागू नहीं है?
o: Money Bills and Amendment Bills (धन विधेयक और संशोधन विधेयक)
e: 1. Core Concept: Exclusions. \n2. Logic: In bills mein dono houses ka role predefined aur strictly separate hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Constitutional Amendment (Art 368) mein dono ka barabar se pass hona zaroori hai.

q: Who is the 'First Citizen' of the Parliament? / संसद का 'प्रथम नागरिक' किसे माना जाता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Constitutional hierarchy. \n2. Logic: President Sansad ka abhinn ang (Integral part) hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Sansad = President + Lok Sabha + Rajya Sabha.

q: The 'Committee on Public Undertakings' consists of how many members? / 'सार्वजनिक उपक्रम समिति' में कितने सदस्य होते हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Monitoring PSUs. \n2. Logic: Ye LIC, ONGC jaise sarkari companies ki accounts check karti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Krishna Menon Committee ki recommendation par ise 1964 mein banaya gaya.

q: What is 'Censure Motion' used for? / 'निंदा प्रस्ताव' का उपयोग किसलिए किया जाता है?
o: To criticize a specific minister or policies (विशिष्ट मंत्री या नीतियों की निंदा करने के लिए)
e: 1. Core Concept: Targeted criticism. \n2. Logic: Ye pure cabinet ke khilaaf bhi laya ja sakta hai, par isme reason batana zaroori hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Iske pass hone par sarkar nahi girti (unlike No-Confidence).

q: What is the 'Maximum Life' of an Ordinance issued by the President? / राष्ट्रपति द्वारा जारी अध्यादेश की 'अधिकतम अवधि' क्या है?
o: 6 months and 6 weeks (6 महीने और 6 हफ्ते)
e: 1. Core Concept: Article 123 ke tehat temporary kanoon. \n2. Logic: Do session ke beech max gap 6 mahine ka hota hai, aur session shuru hone ke 6 hafte ke andar ise pass hona zaroori hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Agar Sansad 6 hafte mein action nahi leti, toh ordinance radd (expire) ho jata hai.

q: Which among these is NOT a stage in the passage of an Ordinary Bill? / साधारण विधेयक पारित होने में इनमें से कौन सा एक चरण नहीं है?
o: Joint Sitting before Second Reading (दूसरी रीडिंग से पहले संयुक्त बैठक)
e: 1. Core Concept: Legislative Process. \n2. Logic: Joint sitting tabhi hoti hai jab dono houses mein deadlock ho jaye, ye normal 'Reading' ka hissa nahi hai. \n3. Extra Fact: 'Second Reading' sabse important hoti hai kyunki isi waqt bill par baarikyion se charcha hoti hai.

q: The 'Leader of the Opposition' (विपक्ष का नेता) is a statutory post. What is the required strength for this? / विपक्ष का नेता एक वैधानिक पद है। इसके लिए आवश्यक सदस्य संख्या क्या है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Parliamentary Accountability. \n2. Logic: Kisi party ko LOP ka darja tabhi milta hai jab uske paas kam se kam 10% seats hon. \n3. Extra Fact: Ise 'Cabinet Minister' ke barabar rank aur suvidhayein milti hain.

q: Who can dissolve the 'Lok Sabha' before its 5-year term? / 5 साल का कार्यकाल पूरा होने से पहले 'लोकसभा' को कौन भंग कर सकता है?
o: The President on advice of PM (पीएम की सलाह पर राष्ट्रपति)
e: 1. Core Concept: Executive Control. \n2. Logic: Article 85(2) ke tehat Rashtrapati hi Lok Sabha bhang karte hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Rajya Sabha ko kabhi bhang nahi kiya ja sakta, wo ek permanent body hai.

q: Article 105 deals with 'Parliamentary Privileges'. Do they apply to the President? / अनुच्छेद 105 'संसदीय विशेषाधिकार' से संबंधित है। क्या वे राष्ट्रपति पर लागू होते हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Scope of Privileges. \n2. Logic: Privileges MPs aur Attorney General ko milte hain jo sadan ki karyawahi mein baithte hain. Rashtrapati ke liye Article 361 mein alag 'Immunities' hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Privileges ka maksad bina dar ke apna kaam karne ki azadi dena hai.

q: The 'Joint Sitting' is governed by the Rules of Procedure of: / 'संयुक्त बैठक' किसके प्रक्रिया नियमों द्वारा संचालित होती है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Procedural Control. \n2. Logic: Joint sitting ki adhyakshta Speaker karta hai aur kanoon Lok Sabha ke rules ke hisab se chalta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme decisions 'Simple Majority' se liye jate hain.

q: What is 'Censure Motion' used for? / 'निंदा प्रस्ताव' (Censure Motion) का उपयोग किसलिए किया जाता है?
o: To criticize specific policies of a Minister (किसी मंत्री की विशिष्ट नीतियों की निंदा के लिए)
e: 1. Core Concept: Parliamentary oversight. \n2. Logic: Isme mantri ki kisi galti par 'Ninda' ki jati hai. Iske pass hone se sarkar nahi girti. \n3. Extra Fact: No-confidence motion mein koi reason nahi dena hota, par isme dena padta hai.

q: Which of the following describes 'Starred Questions' (तारांकित प्रश्न) correctly? / 'तारांकित प्रश्न' का सही वर्णन कौन सा है?
o: They require an oral answer (मौखिक उत्तर की आवश्यकता)
They are asked by the President
They are not allowed in Zero Hour
e: 1. Core Concept: Question Hour Types. \n2. Logic: Starred sawalo ka jawab mantri mooh-zabani deta hai aur sadasya 'Supplementary Questions' (purak sawal) puch sakte hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Unstarred sawalo ka jawab written mein dena hota hai.

q: The 'Speaker Pro-tem' is appointed by: / 'प्रोटेम स्पीकर' की नियुक्ति किसके द्वारा की जाती है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Temporary leadership. \n2. Logic: Nayi Lok Sabha ke election ke baad, members ko shapath dilane ke liye President senior-most member ko Pro-tem speaker banate hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Jaise hi naya Speaker chuna jata hai, ye pad khatam ho jata hai.

q: Article 117 is related to which type of Bill? / अनुच्छेद 117 किस प्रकार के विधेयक से संबंधित है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Types of Bills. \n2. Logic: Har Money Bill Financial Bill hota hai, par har Financial Bill Money Bill nahi hota. \n3. Extra Fact: Financial Bill Category-1 mein President ki prior recommendation zaroori hoti hai.

q: The 'Rajya Sabha' was first constituted in which year? / राज्यसभा का गठन पहली बार किस वर्ष किया गया था?
e: 1. Core Concept: Post-independence history. \n2. Logic: 3 April 1952 ko iska pehli baar gathan hua. \n3. Extra Fact: Pehle ise 'Council of States' kaha jata tha, 1954 mein iska naam Rajya Sabha pada.

q: How many members are required to support a 'No-Confidence Motion' for its admission? / 'अविश्वास प्रस्ताव' स्वीकार करने के लिए कितने सदस्यों के समर्थन की आवश्यकता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Stability of Govt. \n2. Logic: Lok Sabha ke kam se kam 50 sadasyo ka support hone par hi ise admit kiya jata hai taaki bina wajah sarkar pareshan na ho. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye motion sirf 'Lok Sabha' mein laya ja sakta hai.

q: Article 120 says that the 'Language' of Parliament shall be: / अनुच्छेद 120 कहता है कि संसद की 'भाषा' होगी:
e: 1. Core Concept: Language of Business. \n2. Logic: Parliamentary kaam Hindi aur English mein hote hain, par Speaker ki ijazat se koi apni mother-tongue mein bhi bol sakta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: 1965 ke baad English ko band hona tha, par Official Languages Act ne ise continue rakha.

q: Who is the 'Ex-officio Chairman' of the Rules Committee of Lok Sabha? / लोकसभा की नियम समिति का 'पदेन अध्यक्ष' कौन होता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: House Management. \n2. Logic: Sadan ke rules Speaker hi control karta hai, isliye wahi is committee ka head hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Rajya Sabha mein iska head Vice-President (Chairman) hota hai.

q: The 'Budget' is presented in the Lok Sabha in the name of? / लोकसभा में 'बजट' किसके नाम पर प्रस्तुत किया जाता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Constitutional Responsibility. \n2. Logic: Article 112 kehta hai ki Rashtrapati har saal budget ko Sansad ke samne rakhwayenge. \n3. Extra Fact: Finance Minister ise sirf Rashtrapati ki taraf se pesh karta hai.

q: What is 'Whip' in parliamentary terms? / संसदीय शब्दावली में 'सचेतक' (Whip) क्या है?
o: An officer of a political party to ensure discipline (अनुशासन के लिए पार्टी का अधिकारी)
e: 1. Core Concept: Party Discipline. \n2. Logic: Har party apna 'Whip' chunti hai jo members ko batata hai ki kis side vote dena hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Whip ke order ko na manna 'Anti-Defection Law' ke tehat aayogyata (disqualification) ka karan ban sakta hai.

q: Article 100 provides for 'Casting Vote'. Who uses this power? / अनुच्छेद 100 'निर्णायक मत' (Casting Vote) का प्रावधान करता है। इस शक्ति का उपयोग कौन करता है?
o: The Speaker or Chairman (अध्यक्ष या सभापति)
e: 1. Core Concept: Tie-breaker. \n2. Logic: Jab kisi bill par '50-50' ki barabari ho jaye, toh Speaker apna vote deta hai tie todne ke liye. \n3. Extra Fact: Normal voting mein Speaker hissa nahi leta.

q: The 'Committee on Public Undertakings' was created on the recommendation of: / 'सार्वजनिक उपक्रम समिति' किसकी सिफारिश पर बनाई गई थी?
e: 1. Core Concept: Monitoring PSUs. \n2. Logic: 1964 mein ise LIC, ONGC jaise sarkari companies ki accounts check karne ke liye banaya gaya. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme 22 sadasya hote hain (15 LS + 7 RS).

q: Can the 'Rajya Sabha' vote on the 'Demands for Grants'? / क्या राज्यसभा 'अनुदान की मांगों' पर मतदान कर सकती है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Financial Power. \n2. Logic: Grants par voting sirf 'Lok Sabha' mein hoti hai kyunki wahi 'Janata' ko represent karti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Rajya Sabha ispar sirf charcha (discussion) kar sakti hai.

q: Which Article provides for the 'Secretariat of Parliament'? / संसद के 'सचिवालय' के लिए कौन सा अनुच्छेद प्रावधान करता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Administrative Independence. \n2. Logic: Dono houses ka apna alag staff aur secretariat hota hai taaki wo executive se alag reh kar kaam kar sakein. \n3. Extra Fact: Iska head 'Secretary General' hota hai.

q: What is 'Point of Order' (औचित्य का प्रश्न)? / 'औचित्य का प्रश्न' (Point of Order) क्या है?
o: Violation of House Rules (सदन के नियमों का उल्लंघन)
e: 1. Core Concept: House Discipline. \n2. Logic: Jab koi member dekhta hai ki sadan ke rules follow nahi ho rahe, toh wo 'Point of Order' uthata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Is par koi behes nahi hoti, Speaker turant faisla sunata hai.

q: Article 101 deals with the 'Vacation of Seats'. Can a person be a member of both Houses? / अनुच्छेद 101 सीटों के खाली होने से संबंधित है। क्या कोई व्यक्ति दोनों सदनों का सदस्य हो सकता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Single Membership. \n2. Logic: Agar koi dono mein chuna jata hai, toh use 10 din ke andar ek seat chhodni padti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ek insaan ek sath Sansad aur State Assembly ka member bhi nahi ho sakta.

q: The 'Estimates Committee' is also known as: / 'प्राक्कलन समिति' को और किस नाम से जाना जाता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Expenditure monitoring. \n2. Logic: Ye committee sarkar ke kharch mein 'bachat' (efficiency) lane ke tarike sujhati hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme 30 sadasya hote hain aur sabhi Lok Sabha se hote hain.

q: Who is the 'Leader of the House' in Lok Sabha? / लोकसभा में 'सदन का नेता' कौन होता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Political Leadership in House. \n2. Logic: PM hamesha Lok Sabha ka leader hota hai (agar wo iska member hai). \n3. Extra Fact: Agar PM Rajya Sabha se hai, toh wo LS mein kisi mantri ko leader nominate karta hai.

q: What is 'Vote on Account' (लेखानुदान) under Article 116? / अनुच्छेद 116 के तहत 'लेखानुदान' (Vote on Account) क्या है?
o: Interim grant to run govt (सरकार चलाने के लिए अंतरिम अनुदान)
e: 1. Core Concept: Financial gap filler. \n2. Logic: Budget pass hone mein time lagta hai, isliye 2 mahine ka kharch pehle hi le liya jata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye sirf 'Expenditure' (kharch) side ke liye hota hai.

q: Article 105(2) says no MP is liable to any proceedings in any court for anything said in Parliament. / अनुच्छेद 105(2) कहता है कि कोई भी सांसद संसद में कही गई किसी भी बात के लिए अदालत के प्रति उत्तरदायी नहीं है।
e: 1. Core Concept: Parliamentary Immunity. \n2. Logic: Iska maksad bina dar ke debates karne ki azadi dena hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye 'Freedom of Speech' ka hi ek vistar (extension) hai.

q: The 'Panel of Chairpersons' in Rajya Sabha is nominated by: / राज्यसभा में 'सभापति तालिका' का नामांकन किसके द्वारा किया जाता है?
o: The Chairman of Rajya Sabha (राज्यसभा सभापति)
e: 1. Core Concept: Backup leadership. \n2. Logic: Jab Chairman aur Deputy Chairman nahi hote, toh is panel ka member sadan chalata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme max 6 sadasya hote hain.

q: Which Article gives the Parliament power to 'Regulate its own Procedure'? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद संसद को 'अपनी प्रक्रिया को विनियमित करने' की शक्ति देता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Autonomy of Parliament. \n2. Logic: Sansad apne kaam karne ke tareeke khud tay karti hai, court isme dakhal nahi deta. \n3. Extra Fact: Isi ke tehat LS aur RS ke 'Rules of Procedure' bane hain.

q: The 'Attorney General' can participate in Parliament proceedings but cannot: / 'महान्यायवादी' संसद की कार्यवाही में भाग ले सकता है लेकिन क्या नहीं कर सकता?
e: 1. Core Concept: Non-member rights. \n2. Logic: AG sadasya nahi hota, isliye wo 'Vote' nahi de sakta. \n3. Extra Fact: Wo India ke kisi bhi court mein audience ka haq rakhta hai.

q: What is 'Prorogation' (सत्रावसान)? / 'सत्रावसान' (Prorogation) क्या है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Session Closure. \n2. Logic: Adjournment sirf din ki baithak rokta hai, Prorogation poora session khatam karta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye kaam President karta hai.

q: Article 109 provides the 'Special Procedure' for: / अनुच्छेद 109 किसके लिए 'विशेष प्रक्रिया' प्रदान करता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Money Bill process. \n2. Logic: Isme bataya gaya hai ki Money Bill RS mein radd nahi ho sakta aur 14 din ki limit hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Definition 110 mein hai, par 'Procedure' 109 mein hai.

q: Who is the 'Custodian' of Parliamentary Privileges? / संसदीय विशेषाधिकारों का 'अभिरक्षक' कौन है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Guardian of House Rights. \n2. Logic: Speaker hi dekhta hai ki kisi MP ke rights ka hanan na ho. \n3. Extra Fact: Iske liye 'Privileges Committee' banayi jati hai.

q: What is the 'Maximum Term' of a member of the Estimates Committee? / प्राक्कलन समिति के सदस्य का 'अधिकतम कार्यकाल' क्या है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Annual Committees. \n2. Logic: Parliamentary Standing Committees ke sadasyo ka term har saal khatam hota hai aur naye sadasya chune jate hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme koi 'Minister' member nahi ban sakta.

q: The 'Appropriation Bill' (Art 114) allows the Govt to: / 'विनियोग विधेयक' सरकार को क्या अनुमति देता है?
o: Withdraw money from Consolidated Fund (संचित निधि से पैसा निकालना)
e: 1. Core Concept: Legal power to spend. \n2. Logic: Bina is bill ke pass hue, sarkar ek rupaya bhi kharch nahi kar sakti. \n3. Extra Fact: Ise 'Power of the Purse' kehte hain.

q: Which Article says 'Parliament shall consist of President and two Houses'? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद कहता है कि 'संसद राष्ट्रपति और दो सदनों से मिलकर बनेगी'?
e: 1. Core Concept: Composition of Parliament. \n2. Logic: President Sansad ka member nahi hota, par uska 'Abhinn Ang' (Integral Part) hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Bina President ke sign ke koi kanoon nahi ban sakta.

q: The 'Rajya Sabha' has a special power to move a resolution to remove the Vice-President. / राज्यसभा के पास उपराष्ट्रपति को हटाने का प्रस्ताव लाने की विशेष शक्ति है।
e: 1. Core Concept: VP removal. \n2. Logic: Chunki VP Rajya Sabha ka chairman hai, isliye ise hatane ka prastav sirf RS mein hi shuru ho sakta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Lekin Lok Sabha ki sahamati (agreement) zaroori hoti hai.

q: In the Lok Sabha, the 'Opposition Leader' gets the status of: / लोकसभा में 'विपक्ष के नेता' को किसका दर्जा प्राप्त है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Rank and Facilities. \n2. Logic: Loktantra mein vipaksh ki ahmiyat badhane ke liye ise Cabinet rank di gayi hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Iska mention 'Salary and Allowances of Leaders of Opposition Act, 1977' mein hai.

q: What is 'Quillotine' used for in Budget procedure? / बजट प्रक्रिया में 'गिलोटिन' का उपयोग किस लिए किया जाता है?
o: To pass demands for grants without discussion (बिना चर्चा के अनुदान मांगों को पारित करना)
e: 1. Core Concept: Speeding up voting. \n2. Logic: Budget session ke aakhri din samay bachane ke liye sabhi bachi hui grants par ek sath vote karwa diya jata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye tab hota hai jab charcha ke liye samay khatam ho jaye.

q: Which Article gives the Parliament power to form 'New States'? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद संसद को 'नए राज्य' बनाने की शक्ति देता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Internal boundary changes. \n2. Logic: Sansad kisi bhi rajya ka naam, boundary ya area badal sakti hai 'Simple Majority' se. \n3. Extra Fact: Article 2 videshi ilako ko India mein jodne ke liye hai.

q: The 'Joint Sitting' is chaired by the Speaker. If he is absent, then who? / संयुक्त बैठक की अध्यक्षता अध्यक्ष करता है। यदि वह अनुपस्थित हो, तो कौन?
e: 1. Core Concept: Order of Presidency. \n2. Logic: Speaker nahi toh Deputy Speaker, wo nahi toh Deputy Chairman of Rajya Sabha. \n3. Extra Fact: Chairman (VP) kabhi adhyakshta nahi karta kyunki wo MP nahi hota.

q: Article 106 deals with the 'Salaries and Allowances' of: / अनुच्छेद 106 किसके 'वेतन और भत्तों' से संबंधित है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Remuneration. \n2. Logic: Sansad kanoon banakar MPs ki salary tay karti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye salary Consolidated Fund par 'Charged' nahi hoti, yani is par voting ho sakti hai.

q: A bill pending in Lok Sabha 'lapses' on its dissolution. / लोकसभा में लंबित विधेयक इसके भंग होने पर 'समाप्त' हो जाता है।
o: Only if it is a Money Bill
e: 1. Core Concept: Continuity of Bills. \n2. Logic: Agar sadan bhang ho gaya, toh usme chal rahe saare bills khatam ho jate hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Rajya Sabha mein shuru hua bill agar LS nahi pahuncha, toh wo khatam nahi hota.

q: Who was the 'First Speaker' of Lok Sabha? / लोकसभा के 'प्रथम अध्यक्ष' कौन थे?
e: 1. Core Concept: Historical firsts. \n2. Logic: 1952 mein wo pehle Speaker bane. \n3. Extra Fact: Unhe 'Father of the Lok Sabha' bhi kaha jata hai.

q: Article 81 deals with the 'Composition of Lok Sabha'. What is the current base year for seats? / अनुच्छेद 81 लोकसभा की संरचना से संबंधित है। सीटों के लिए वर्तमान आधार वर्ष क्या है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Population Census. \n2. Logic: States ki seats 1971 ki population par freeze hain taaki family planning karne wale states ko nuksan na ho. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye 2026 tak freeze rakha gaya hai.

q: The 'Committee on Petitions' of Lok Sabha has how many members? / लोकसभा की 'याचिका समिति' में कितने सदस्य होते हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Public Grievance. \n2. Logic: Ye aam janata ki shikayato (petitions) ko sunti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Rajya Sabha ki committee mein 10 members hote hain.

q: Article 87 provides for 'Special Address' by the President. When does it happen? / अनुच्छेद 87 राष्ट्रपति द्वारा 'विशेष संबोधन' का प्रावधान करता है। यह कब होता है?
o: After each General Election and start of first session each year (हर आम चुनाव के बाद और हर साल के पहले सत्र में)
e: 1. Core Concept: Opening of Parliament. \n2. Logic: Ye address sarkar ki nitiyon (policies) ka blueprint hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ise 'Motion of Thanks' ke baad pass kiya jata hai.

q: Who is the 'Highest Administrative Officer' of the Lok Sabha? / लोकसभा का 'उच्चतम प्रशासनिक अधिकारी' कौन है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Bureaucracy in Parliament. \n2. Logic: Secretary General ek IAS officer rank ka hota hai jo sadan ka sara admin sambhalta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Use Speaker appoint karta hai.

q: What is the 'Motion of Thanks' (धन्यवाद प्रस्ताव)? / 'धन्यवाद प्रस्ताव' क्या है?
o: Discussion on President's address (राष्ट्रपति के अभिभाषण पर चर्चा)
e: 1. Core Concept: Article 87 ke tehat President naye saal ke pehle session mein address karte hain. \n2. Logic: Is par dono houses mein charcha hoti hai aur ise pass karna Govt ke liye 'Confidence' ka test hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Agar ye pass nahi hota, toh mana jata hai ki sarkar ke paas bahumat nahi hai.

q: Which Article provides for the 'Joint Sitting' of Parliament? / संसद की 'संयुक्त बैठक' का प्रावधान कौन सा अनुच्छेद करता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Deadlock Resolution. \n2. Logic: Jab dono houses kisi Ordinary Bill par sehmat na hon, toh President dono ko sath bulate hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Iski adhyakshta Lok Sabha Speaker karta hai. Money Bill aur Amendment Bill par ye nahi ho sakti.

q: The 'Estimates Committee' (प्राक्कलन समिति) consists of members from: / 'प्राक्कलन समिति' में कहाँ के सदस्य होते हैं?
e: 1. Core Concept: Financial scrutiny. \n2. Logic: Isme 30 members hote hain aur sabhi 'Lok Sabha' se hote hain kyunki paiso par LS ka haq zyada hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Iska term 1 saal hota hai aur koi Mantri iska sadasya nahi ban sakta.

q: Who can dissolve the 'Rajya Sabha'? / 'राज्यसभा' को कौन भंग कर सकता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Permanent House. \n2. Logic: Rajya Sabha ek permanent body hai jo kabhi bhang nahi hoti. \n3. Extra Fact: Iske 1/3 sadasya har do saal mein retire hote hain, isliye ye chalti rehti hai.

q: Article 110 defines Money Bill. Who has the final power to certify it? / अनुच्छेद 110 धन विधेयक को परिभाषित करता है। इसे प्रमाणित करने की अंतिम शक्ति किसके पास है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Certification of Bills. \n2. Logic: Speaker ka faisla aakhri hota hai ki koi bill Money Bill hai ya nahi. \n3. Extra Fact: Use kisi court ya President dwara sawal nahi kiya ja sakta.

q: What is 'Zero Hour' (शून्य काल) in Indian Parliament? / भारतीय संसद में 'शून्य काल' क्या है?
o: Informal time to raise urgent matters (तत्काल मामलों को उठाने का अनौपचारिक समय)
e: 1. Core Concept: Indian Innovation. \n2. Logic: Question Hour (11-12) ke turant baad 12 baje ye shuru hota hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Iska zikr Rules of Procedure mein nahi hai, ye ek convention (parampara) hai.

q: The 'Public Accounts Committee' (PAC) includes members from: / 'लोक लेखा समिति' (PAC) में सदस्य शामिल होते हैं:
e: 1. Core Concept: Financial Watchdog. \n2. Logic: Isme 22 members hote hain (15 LS aur 7 RS). \n3. Extra Fact: Iska mukhya kaam CAG ki report ki jaanch karna hai.

q: Who is the 'Ex-officio Chairman' of the Rajya Sabha? / राज्यसभा का 'पदेन सभापति' कौन होता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Dual role of VP. \n2. Logic: Jo bhi Bharat ka Vice-President banega, wo apne aap RS ka Chairman ban jayega (Article 64). \n3. Extra Fact: Use salary VP ke liye nahi, balki Chairman ke roop mein milti hai.

q: What is 'Quorum' (कोरम) in Parliament? / संसद में 'कोरम' क्या है?
o: Minimum members for meeting (बैठक के लिए न्यूनतम सदस्य)
e: 1. Core Concept: Functionality of House. \n2. Logic: Article 100 ke tehat sadan ki baithak ke liye kam se kam 1/10th (10%) members ka hona zaroori hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme Speaker/Chairman ko bhi gina jata hai.

q: Article 123 gives the President power to issue 'Ordinances'. When? / अनुच्छेद 123 राष्ट्रपति को 'अध्यादेश' जारी करने की शक्ति कब देता है?
o: When Parliament is NOT in session (जब संसद सत्र में न हो)
e: 1. Core Concept: Temporary Laws. \n2. Logic: Agar koi urgent kanoon chahiye aur Sansad ki chutti hai, toh President ordinance nikal sakte hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Iski maximum life 6 mahine aur 6 hafte hoti hai.

q: Who decides the disqualification of an MP under 'Anti-Defection Law'? / 'दलबदल विरोधी कानून' के तहत सांसद की अयोग्यता का निर्णय कौन करता है?
o: Speaker or Chairman of the House (सदन के अध्यक्ष या सभापति)
e: 1. Core Concept: 10th Schedule. \n2. Logic: Agar koi party badalta hai, toh us sadan ka head use disqualify karta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Is faisle ka 'Judicial Review' ho sakta hai (Kihoto Hollohan Case).

q: The 'Consolidated Fund of India' is mentioned in which Article? / 'भारत की संचित निधि' का उल्लेख किस अनुच्छेद में है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Government's Main Wallet. \n2. Logic: Saare taxes aur kamayi isi mein jama hoti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Bina Sansad ki ijazat (Appropriation Bill) ke isse paisa nahi nikala ja sakta.

q: What is 'Vote on Account' (लेखानुदान)? / 'लेखानुदान' क्या है?
o: Grant to run govt until budget is passed (बजट पास होने तक सरकार चलाने का खर्च)
e: 1. Core Concept: Article 116. \n2. Logic: Budget pass hone mein time lagta hai, isliye 2 mahine ka kharch advance mein le liya jata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye sirf 'Expenditure' (kharch) ke liye hota hai.

q: Who is the 'Custodian' of the Lok Sabha? / लोकसभा का 'अभिरक्षक' कौन है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Guardian of House Rights. \n2. Logic: Speaker hi sadan ki maryada aur members ke privileges ko bachata hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Sadan ke andar uska faisla sarvopari (supreme) hota hai.

q: Article 112 refers to 'Annual Financial Statement'. What is its common name? / अनुच्छेद 112 'वार्षिक वित्तीय विवरण' को संदर्भित करता है। इसका सामान्य नाम क्या है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Financial Blueprint. \n2. Logic: Samvidhan mein 'Budget' shabd nahi hai, uski jagah 'Annual Financial Statement' likha hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye har saal President ki ijazat se pesh hota hai.

q: Which Article deals with 'Parliamentary Privileges'? / 'संसदीय विशेषाधिकार' से संबंधित कौन सा अनुच्छेद है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Freedom to speak in House. \n2. Logic: MPs ko sadan ke andar kahi gayi baato ke liye court mein nahi ghaseeta ja sakta. \n3. Extra Fact: Isme 'Freedom from Arrest' bhi shamil hai (Civil cases mein).

q: The 'Whip' of a political party is responsible for: / किसी राजनीतिक दल का 'सचेतक' (Whip) किसके लिए जिम्मेदार है?
o: Ensuring party discipline and presence (पार्टी अनुशासन और उपस्थिति सुनिश्चित करना)
e: 1. Core Concept: Party Coordination. \n2. Logic: Whip members ko batata hai ki kab aur kaise vote dena hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Whip ka order na manna aayogya (disqualification) bana sakta hai.

q: What is 'Prorogation' (सत्रावसान)? / 'सत्रावसान' क्या है?
o: Ending a session of the House (सदन के सत्र का अंत)
e: 1. Core Concept: Session Closure. \n2. Logic: Adjournment sirf baithak rokta hai, Prorogation poora session (Budget etc.) khatam karta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye kaam President karta hai.

q: Which House of Parliament can initiate 'Constitutional Amendment'? / संसद का कौन सा सदन 'संविधान संशोधन' शुरू कर सकता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Article 368. \n2. Logic: Amendment bill LS ya RS kahin bhi shuru ho sakta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Dono houses ko ise alag-alag pass karna zaroori hai.

q: The 'Appropriation Bill' (Article 114) is passed for: / 'विनियोग विधेयक' किसके लिए पारित किया जाता है?
o: Withdrawing money from Consolidated Fund (संचित निधि से पैसा निकालना)
e: 1. Core Concept: Legal power to spend. \n2. Logic: Bina is bill ke pass hue, sarkar ek paisa bhi kharch nahi kar sakti. \n3. Extra Fact: Ise 'Power of the Purse' kehte hain.

q: Who is the 'Highest Administrative Officer' of the Rajya Sabha? / राज्यसभा का 'उच्चतम प्रशासनिक अधिकारी' कौन है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Secretariat Head. \n2. Logic: Secretary General sadan ki admin duties sambhalta hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Use Chairman appoint karta hai.

q: Article 312 empowers Rajya Sabha to create: / अनुच्छेद 312 राज्यसभा को क्या बनाने की शक्ति देता है?
o: New All India Services (नई अखिल भारतीय सेवाएं)
e: 1. Core Concept: Federal Power of RS. \n2. Logic: Rajya Sabha IAS/IPS jaisi nayi services shuru karne ka prastav de sakti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ye RS ki ek vishesh (special) shakti hai.

q: What is 'Lame Duck' session of Parliament? / संसद का 'लेम डक' सत्र क्या है?
o: Last session before a new Lok Sabha is elected (नई लोकसभा से पहले का अंतिम सत्र)
e: 1. Core Concept: Final meeting of outgoing MPs. \n2. Logic: Isme wo members hote hain jo agle election mein nahi chune gaye. \n3. Extra Fact: Unhe hi 'Lame Ducks' kaha jata hai.

q: Article 108 (Joint Sitting) does NOT apply to which Bill? / अनुच्छेद 108 (संयुक्त बैठक) किस विधेयक पर लागू नहीं होता?
o: Money Bill and Amendment Bill (धन विधेयक और संशोधन विधेयक)
e: 1. Core Concept: Exceptions to Joint Sitting. \n2. Logic: Money bill aur Amendment bill dono mein houses ki shaktiyan strictly divided hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Amendment bill mein dono ka alag se sehmat hona zaroori hai.

q: Who addresses the first session of Parliament each year? / हर साल संसद के पहले सत्र को कौन संबोधित करता है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Article 87. \n2. Logic: Har saal ke pehle session (Budget session) ki shuruat President ke address se hoti hai. \n3. Extra Fact: Ise 'Motion of Thanks' ke baad pass kiya jata hai.

q: The 'Contingency Fund of India' (Art 267) is at the disposal of? / 'भारत की आकस्मिकता निधि' किसके पास होती है?
e: 1. Core Concept: Emergency Money. \n2. Logic: Achanak aaye kharch (Unforeseen expenditure) ke liye President isse paisa de sakte hain. \n3. Extra Fact: Baad mein Sansad se iski ijazat leni padti hai.
